title: Chain-of-Command wrapper on FMVehicleDataContract.CarFactsSummary
instruction: In the sandbox model, add a Chain-of-Command wrapper extension class for the standard Fleet Management method FMVehicleDataContract.CarFactsSummary(str). The wrapper must call `next CarFactsSummary(...)` and return the base result with the literal suffix ' [verified]' appended (i.e. `return next CarFactsSummary(carFactsSummary) + ' [verified]';`). Use an `[ExtensionOf(classStr(FMVehicleDataContract))]` final class produced through the grounded generate path (use extension_info(mode="points") / prepare(mode="change") to confirm the method is CoC-eligible — do NOT overlayer or modify FMVehicleDataContract). NOTE: the target sandbox model must reference the FleetManagement model (ModelReferences in its Descriptor) or the build fails with "does not specify a known class" even though the symbol index resolves it fine. The class must build clean. Runtime correctness is judged by the SysTest in eval/systests/L2-coc-extension.xml (class EvalL2CocCarFactsTest), which calls the wrapped method and asserts the suffix is appended.
